factions.name: Lantern Carters Guild
factions.description: Road-haulers and ferrymen who keep the frontier supplied, while quietly moving sealed goods for anyone who pays enough.
goals: Prevent church seizure of guild records
internal_tensions: Some members want to stop dealing with ruin cargo
Others think the Church is a greater threat than corruption
factions.relationship_to_plot: They move the satchel, obscure evidence, and can become allies if exposed carefully.

factions.name: Sun Choir of Prios
factions.description: A frontier missionary cell that claims to protect the road from taint but also sees political opportunity in every emergency.
goals: Expand church authority over the frontier
internal_tensions: Sincere priests clash with ambitious witch-hunters
factions.relationship_to_plot: They pursue the same evidence as the protagonist and can help or ruin the investigation depending on trust.

factions.name: Root-Glass Circle
factions.description: A secretive cult of surveyors, binders, and locals who believe the ruin can be made useful if fed correctly.
goals: Open the buried chamber beneath the watchtower
Control the ledger linking donors to the ruin
internal_tensions: Some members want profit while others want revelation at any cost
factions.relationship_to_plot: They are the core antagonistic engine behind the ferryman's death and the opening ritual.
